purpose: Read + write secrets under a project-specific path-prefix
env_var: (uses standard AWS credential chain: AWS_PROFILE / AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID + AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY / IRSA / IAM Role)

minimum_scope.description: Paste the IAM policy below into an inline policy on the IAM principal kit will assume. Replace <region>, <account-id>, and <project-prefix> with your values. The Resource ARN is scoped to a prefix so kit can only touch secrets under that namespace.
minimum_scope.notes: Do NOT grant secretsmanager:DeleteSecret in the same role — separate it into a manual-cleanup policy.
